name: Todo App with Local Storage
description:
Ek simple lekin functional Todo application banao jo browser ke Local Storage mein data save kare. Page refresh karne par bhi tasks remain karein.

Features:

  • Task add, complete aur delete karna
  • Local Storage mein persist karna
  • Filter: All, Active, Completed

name: Weather App using OpenWeather API
description:
OpenWeather API use karke ek weather app banao jo kisi bhi city ka current weather dikhaye.

Features:

  • City search karna
  • Temperature, humidity, wind speed dikhana
  • Weather icon aur description
  • Geolocation se current location ka weather

name: Expense Tracker
description:
Ek expense tracker app banao jisme income aur expenses track kar sako aur Chart.js se visual summary dekh sako.

Features:

  • Income aur expense add karna
  • Balance calculate karna
  • Pie chart se breakdown dekhna
  • Local Storage mein save karna
